titleStmt.title: SII 24.145: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 145. (A.R. No. 335 of 1952-53.) V PRĀKĀRA, OUTER WALL, TO THE RIGHT OF THE PATH LEADING TO THE CHAKRATTĀḺVĀR SHRINE.

summary.p: Damaged. Refers to the same transaction as in the previous record (No. 144) and mentions among the signatories Kāliṅgarāyar and Vāṇādhirājar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kkum Uḷvari jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattup puḻaṟ koṭṭamāṉa coḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Ākuṭināṭṭu Ayiṇṭampākkiḻāṉ tiruvaṉan=ta murtti Aruḷāḷaṉāna vīrarājentirap pallavarayaṉ pāṇāṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tāḻvār rā[ja*]mahentiraṉ tiruviti kiḻait tiruvitiyilum vaṭakkiṟ tiruvitiyilum vaitta brāhmaṇar per 5º ṉālvarkkuThe portion of the text giving the number of the donees here read with the corresponding portion of the text in line 1 of No. 144 seems to indicate their number as 54.Ivaṉ rā[ja*]kempira vaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr maṇaṟkuṭiyil kaṇṇaṉ Āṭ koṇṭa
coḻa ṉum taṉum Āḷappiṟantāṉum ciṟiyāṉum malaivilliyum pa lataṉā lum māceṉaimaṅkalamāṉa ce vāḻaik kurucciyil kiṭaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tiruttikaḻ malai Uṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭamāṭiyai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivar [ bāryai] vāḻaikkuṟicci Uṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ periya nāyaṉ viruntam Iṭappākam koṇṭāṉp perumarutūrp perumāṉ paṭṭaṉ perilum vilai koṇṭa piramāṇappaṭi nilattukku Ūr kaṇakku Aḻakiya maṇavāḷappiriyar Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭiyumkaḷḷa caṉamom
[virutarāja payaṅkara]caruppetimaṅkalattu śrīvilla vaikotta kuḻakaṉāṉa paṭṭa pirāṉampi pakkal ka kuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ tillaināyaṉ perilum pārattuvāci cūriyatevaṉ vikkiramakecari paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉum Ampalattāṭi pirāntaka tevapaṭṭaṉum nakkaṉ ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭaṉum tirupputtūr paṭṭapirāṉ vikkiramakecaripaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum tiruppert tirumāliruñ colai nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉ Ananta nārāyaṇa[p^2^] paṭṭaṉum śrī vāsu te
ṇapuramu ruvaril paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiruccentuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟimpalanampiyum nakkaṉ ciriḷaṅko tirupputtūr paṭṭapirāṉ vikkiramakecari paṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum tiruppert tirumāliruñ colai nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ makaṉ Aṉanta nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi centapirāṉ paṭṭaṉum śrīvāsutevaṉ Aṉanta nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Uṭaṉ parivartaṉai paṇṇiṉa tiṭṭuppaṭi
veḷḷāṉ ṉum nakaikkumāṅkuṭiyāṉa rācentiracoḻapurapaṭṭaṇa rukiṟa paṭiyum Iṟaiyiliyil kuntāli veṭṭiyāṉ Iṟaiyiliyum Ūrkkaṇakku jivitamumāṉa nilam nikki nīkkiniṉṟa nilattil Opāti Eṟṟukaiyum tavirntu Ivan kuṭutta paṭiye Ippirāmaṇaṟku kāṇiyāka yāṇṭu 2 10 4 pacāṉa mutal Ayiṇṭampākkiḻāṉ brahmateya meṉṉum peyar kuṭiyil taram peṟṟa
nilattum kuṟainta nilattum Opāti rūpāy 3(1/2) � Ü I rūpāy ta Uṭaiyār cuṅkantaviṟtaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yū kkuṟainta nilattu Opātirūpāy 5 cai ki 5gha Āka rūpāy 10 8(1/2) kiḻakku (1/2) � ¿ þ ki (1/2) pama þṉāl nila Opāti paḻaviṟai ḷa kataḷa . rūpāy 10 7—100 � śvapa � niccayitta Opāti ḷa 2 100 4 10 8—100 �nmaḷaha� Īcāṉa maṅkalam virutarājapayaṅkaraccaruppeti maṅkalattu taram peṟṟa rūpāy 10li Itil kuntāli veṭṭiyāṉ Ūṟ kiḻ Iṟaiyilāṉa
Opāti rūpāy ba�ṅa (1/2)makiḻakku basa 3m 10 3 nta nilattu Opāti rūpāy (1/2) pamakiḻakku ṅanya Āka rūpāy 10 5(1/2)üë kiḻakku ṉāl Opāti paḻaviṟai ḷa 1000 niccayitta Opāti ḷa 7 100 3 10 6pataśva � māceṉai maṅkalamāṉa cempiyaṉ vāḷakkuṟucciyil tarampeṟṟa rūpāy 5(1/4)nya rūpāy nyama ¿ Itil kuntāli veṭṭiyāṉukku Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilamāy ciṟappup payiruṭaṉ kūṭṭi nellāka varikkoṇṭu kuṭuttu kanilattu Opāti ṅa kiḻakku nyama ¿ kiḻakku Iṟaiyili
Opāti nakaikku māṅkuṭiyāṉa rājentiracoḻapuram Ivvūr piṭāri Aiyapoḻil mākāḷikku Ūr kiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāyttevatāṉayiṟai yili Iṭṭa nilam rūpāy Ø kiḻakku ma ¿ rūpāy (1/2)nta I 26 100 6 10 6nya þ Uṭaiyār cuṅkantaviṟtaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku 10 varuṣam Iṟai kaṭṭiṉa nilattāl vāracuṅ 1000 5 100 6 10 2—100 Ë ¿ þ ḷa 6 100 niccayitta8 10 5—100pama Uṭaiyār cuṅkantaviṟtaruḷiṉa kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku 10 varuṣam Iṟai
Uṭaiyār cuṅkantaviṟtaruḷiṉa kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 pacāṉamutal brahmateyamāy Oru rāy kūṭṭiṉamaikkum Innilattukku mutal koṇṭu varukiṟapaṭi tavira ṟājentiracoḻapurameṉṟu kūṭiṉa nilattukku toṇṭaimāṉār Üüta niccayittapaṭiyum maṇaṟkuṭiyil niṉṟu māceṉaimaṅkalamāṉa virutarājapayaṅkaracaruppeti maṅkalattu niṉṟum māceṉamaṅkalamāṉa vāḻaik kuṟicciyil niṉṟum kūṭiṉa nilattukku Ivvūr
ṇṭa mutalāy Iṟukkum Ūrkkālāl ḷa 10 442—100 kāril pacāṉa mutalukku ḷa 3 1000 2 100 6 10 3—100 Āna ḷa 1000 6 100 6 � yāṇṭu 2 10 4 pacāṉa mutal taṇṭum paṭikkum Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇa nāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻaveṉaḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi Īṅkai Uṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam Ūḻntai Uṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi pantaṇai nallūruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravu vari śrīkaraṇam kū ntavaṉ nallūruṭaiyāneḻuttu Ivai puravuvari
Eḻuttu Ivai paṉṉāṭuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāya neḻuttu Ivai vāṇādhirājaneḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
